description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and a combination of wood-textured and large glass surfaces. The front facade is dominated by tall, floor-to-ceiling windows and glass doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The rear side opens onto a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a fire pit, ideal for leisure and entertaining. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden panels, giving the structure a warm, contemporary appearance. The roof is flat and minimally detailed, with a small chimney visible. The layout is single-story, emphasizing open, accessible living spaces and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood-paneled exterior, expansive glass windows, and a backyard pool with patio seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass doors and windows framed by wood paneling, with a wooden deck in front.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wood-paneled wall with smaller windows and the edge of the pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large glass windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of glass doors, wood paneling, and the continuation of the deck and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
